titlebar.title: Your project has no unsaved changes.
titlebar.addMedia: Add media: add images and/or audio to your project. These will be copied to your project folder when you save.
titlebar.saveAs: Save as: save a copy of your project to a new location.

map.helpArea: Info: mouse over things in the application to show information about them here. click the "?" button to collapse.
map.zoomIn: Zoom in: zoom in on the map.
map.zoomInDisabled: You are currently as zoomed is as you can be!
map.zoomOut: Zoom out: zoom out on the map.
map.zoomOutDisabled: You are currently as zoomed out as you can be!
map.recenter: Recenter: center the view on the listener.
map.listener: Listener: represents the players' location. you will hear sounds when the listener is overlapping them.
map.itemLocked: Map objects cannot be moved or edited while locked.
map.imagesTitle: Images: the list of images in your project. Images higher on the list are closer to the front.
map.imagesHide: Hide images: click to hide all images on the map.
map.imagesShow: Show images: click to show all images on the map. (Images are currently hidden)
map.image: Image: represents the game environtment. A map, or something more abstract.
map.imageDuplicate: Duplicate image: make a copy of this image on the map.
map.imageDelete: Delete image: delete this image from the map.
map.imageActions: Drag: move. Drag corner: resize (+shift: proportional resize). alt/opt+click: delete.
map.soundsTitle: Sounds: the list of sounds in your project. Sounds higher on the list are closer to the front. Scroll: adjust master volume.
map.soundsHide: Hide sounds: click to hide all sounds on the map. This can be useful for accessing images underneath sound areas.
map.soundsShow: Show sounds: click to show all sounds on the map. (Sounds are currently hidden)
map.soundTypeGlobal: Global sound: plays everywhere and does not have an emitter on the map.
map.soundTypeLocal: Local sound: emanates from a single point on the map.
map.soundTypeArea: Area sound: plays at a constant volume across an area.
map.soundPause: Play/pause: this sound is playing. Click: pause this sound.
map.soundUnPause: Play/pause: this sound is paused. Click: play this sound.
map.soundMute: Mute: this sound is muted. Click: unmute this sound.
map.soundUnMute: Mute: this sound is not muted. Click: mute this sound.
map.soundSolo: Solo: this sound is not soloed. Click: solo this sound. This will silence all other sounds.
map.soundUnSolo: Solo: this sound is currently soloed, meaning all other sounds are silenced. Click unsolo.
map.soundDuplicate: Duplicate sound: make a copy of this sound on the map.
map.soundDelete: Delete sound: delete this sound from the map.
map.soundSeek: Seek: seek to a playback position in the sound.
map.soundLocalActions: Drag: move. Drag edge handle: resize. Double-click: lock. alt/opt+click: delete.
map.soundAreaActions: Drag: move. Drag corner: reshape. Drag edge handle: create corner. Click corner handle: remove corner.
